description_long: This rifle features a robust, industrial design with a compact, rectangular receiver and a short, thick barrel. The body is primarily matte gray and olive, with black and metallic accents, and includes a prominent cylindrical magazine mounted below the receiver. There are angular handles and rails on both the top and rear, suggesting ease of carrying and attachment of accessories. The left side displays a cluster of colored buttons or indicators, adding a technological aspect to the weapon. The front end is equipped with a bipod for stability, and the rear has a squared-off stock with a utilitarian appearance. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, industrial-style rifle with a short barrel, cylindrical magazine, bipod, and angular stock, finished in gray, olive, and black. Features colored indicators and robust construction for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical magazine, colored indicator panel, and angular stock.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the twin handles, rails, and the compact, rectangular receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the magazine and stock, with less detail on the indicator panel.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the bipod, barrel opening, and symmetrical handle arrangement.
